description: Pre-defined scenario templates for what-if analysis

templates.name: Status Quo
templates.description: Baseline scenario with current economic conditions and no modifications.

templates.name: Optimistic
templates.description: Favorable economic conditions: lower inflation, lower unemployment, stronger GDP growth.

templates.name: Pessimistic
templates.description: Adverse economic conditions: higher inflation, higher unemployment, stagnant GDP.

templates.name: Housing Crisis
templates.description: Scenario with rapidly rising housing prices and high inflation.

templates.name: Economic Recovery
templates.description: Post-crisis recovery with improving employment and moderate growth.
